corrections.text: The article's Overview paragraph states 'the first rollout planned for the U.S. this summer, according to Variety.' In the cited Variety article, the phrase 'starting in the U.S. this summer' refers to Spotify Reserved — a concert-ticketing product announced at the same Investor Day event — not to the AI covers and remixes feature. TechCrunch explicitly reported that Spotify 'did not share pricing or a launch date for the new [AI covers] tool.' No specific launch timeline for the AI covers and remixes feature was disclosed by either company.
